query:
SELECT 
  u.name, u.email,
  l.digestType, l.weekKey, l.sentDate, l.status, l.itemCount, l.dryRun
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Zec%' OR u.name LIKE '%Daniel%')
ORDER BY l.sentDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
command:

  u.name, u.email,
  l.digestType, l.weekKey, l.sentDate, l.status, l.itemCount, l.dryRun
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE (u.name LIKE '%Zec%' OR u.name LIKE '%Daniel%')
ORDER BY l.sentDate DESC
LIMIT 10;
